wins: Strong revenue growth of $46.8 billion, up 7% YoY
Record client asset net inflows of $553 billion for the year
Robust performance in AWM with $6.5 billion revenue up 13% YoY
Positive consumer and small business resilience with 7% YoY growth in debit and credit sales
Optimistic outlook for 2026 with $95 billion NII ex Markets
risks: Potential impact of credit card APR caps on the card business
Regulatory risks around NBFI lending and stablecoin issues
Lower deposit growth due to yield-seeking flows
Market volatility and geopolitical risks affecting the macro environment
Higher expenses in 2026 due to investments and growth initiatives
